name: Bonk Punch (Reprint)
effect_text: [On Play] Play up to 1 [Monster] from your hand.[DON!! x1] [When Attacking] This Character gains +2000 power during this turn.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set.
